metadata.title: Codeblock Customizer
metadata.description: This Obsidian plugin lets you customize your codeblocks in editing, and reading mode as well.

regex.source: Notice("Could not copy to your clipboard")
Notice(`Theme "${this.plugin.settings.ThemeName}" restored to its original state!`)
regex.target: Notice(`主题 "${this.plugin.settings.ThemeName}" 已恢复到初始状态！`)

regex.source: Notice("Select a theme first to delete")
regex.target: Notice("请选择一个主题进行删除")

regex.source: Notice("You cannot delete the default themes")
Notice("Set a name for your theme!")
regex.target: Notice("为您的主题设置一个名称！")

regex.source: Notice("Default themes restored to their original state!")
regex.target: Notice("默认主题已恢复到初始状态！")

regex.source: Notice(`"${this.plugin.settings.languageSpecificLanguageName}" is not a valid language name.`)
Notice(`A language with the name "${this.plugin.settings.languageSpecificLanguageName}" already exists.`)
regex.target: Notice(`已存在名为 "${this.plugin.settings.languageSpecificLanguageName}" 的语言。`)

regex.source: Notice(`"${this.plugin.settings.alternateHighlightColorName}" is not a valid color name.`)
Notice("You cannot override the default hl parameter.")
regex.target: Notice("无法覆盖默认的 hl 参数。")

regex.source: Notice("You cannot override the fold parameter.")
regex.target: Notice("无法覆盖默认的 fold 参数。")

regex.source: Notice(`A color with the name "${this.plugin.settings.alternateHighlightColorName}" already exists.`)
regex.target: Notice(`已存在名为 "${this.plugin.settings.alternateHighlightColorName}" 的颜色。`)

regex.source: Notice(`${propDisplayText} is already defined for code block language "${languageName}"`)
regex.target: Notice(`${propDisplayText} 已为代码块语言 "${languageName}" 定义。`)

regex.source: Notice(`Updated ${linkUpdateCount} code block links in ${fileCount} files.`)
regex.target: Notice(`已更新 ${linkUpdateCount} 个代码块链接，涉及 ${fileCount} 个文件。`)

regex.source: .error("Invalid JSON content in the SVG configuration file:", error)
regex.target: .error("SVG 配置文件中的 JSON 内容无效:", error)

regex.source: name: "Restore folding state of all code blocks to default"
regex.target: name: "将所有代码块的折叠状态恢复为默认"

regex.source: name: "Indent code block by one level"
name: "Unindent code block by one level"
regex.target: name: "将代码块取消缩进一级"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected element after head. Expected the element before `</head>`"
regex.target: description: "head 之后的元素意外。预期元素在 `</head>` 之前"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected `>` or `->`. Expected `-->` to close comments"
regex.target: description: "意外的 `>` 或 `->`。预期 `-->` 来关闭注释"
description: "意外的 `>`。预期一个关闭的 `\"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected `%c`. Expected `[0-9]` for decimal references or `[0-9a-fA-F]` for hexadecimal references"
regex.target: description: "意外的 `%c`。预期 `[0-9]` 用于十进制引用或 `[0-9a-fA-F]` 用于十六进制引用"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected `<![CDATA[` in HTML. Remove it, use a comment, or encode special characters instead"
regex.target: description: "HTML 中的 `<![CDATA[` 意外。请删除它，使用注释或编码特殊字符"

regex.source: description: "Unexpectedly high character reference. Expected character references to be at most hexadecimal 10ffff (or decimal 1114111)"
regex.target: description: "意外地高的字符引用。预期字符引用最多为十六进制 10ffff（或十进制 1114111）"

regex.source: description: "Unexpectedly closing tag. Expected other tags to be closed first"
regex.target: description: "意外地关闭标签。预期其他标签先关闭"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected control character `%x`. Expected a non-control code point, 0x00, or ASCII whitespace"
regex.target: description: "意外的控制字符 `%x`。预期一个非控制码点，0x00，或 ASCII 空白"

regex.source: description: "Unexpectedly control character in reference. Expected a non-control code point, 0x00, or ASCII whitespace"
regex.target: description: "引用中的意外控制字符。预期一个非控制码点，0x00，或 ASCII 空白"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected text character `%c`. Only use text in `<noscript>`s in `<body>`"
regex.target: description: "意外的文本字符 `%c`。仅在 `<body>` 中的 `<noscript>` 中使用文本"

regex.source: description: "Unexpectedly double attribute. Expected attributes to occur only once"
regex.target: description: "意外地重复属性。预期属性只出现一次"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected end tag. Expected no end tag or another end tag"
regex.target: description: "意外的结束标签。预期没有结束标签或另一个结束标签"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected end of file. Expected tag name instead"
regex.target: description: "意外文件末尾。预期标签名"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected end of file. Expected `]]>` to close the CDATA"
regex.target: description: "意外文件末尾。预期 `]]>` 来关闭 CDATA"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected end of file. Expected `-->` to close the comment"
regex.target: description: "意外文件末尾。预期 `-->` 来关闭注释"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected end of file. Expected a valid doctype (such as `<!doctype html>`)"
regex.target: description: "意外文件末尾。预期有效的 doctype（如 `<!doctype html>`）"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected end of file. Expected text or a closing tag"
regex.target: description: "意外文件末尾。预期文本或关闭标签"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected end of file. Expected `>` to close the tag"
regex.target: description: "意外文件末尾。预期 `>` 来关闭标签"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected `%c-1`. Expected `-->` to close the comment"
regex.target: description: "意外 `%c-1`。预期 `-->` 来关闭注释"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected `%c`. Expected `<!--` to open the comment"
regex.target: description: "意外 `%c`。预期 `<!--` 来打开注释"
description: "在 `%c` 处意外的序列。预期 `public` 或 `system`"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected `%c`. Expected an ASCII letter instead"
regex.target: description: "意外的 `%c`。预期 ASCII 字母"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected doctype. Expected doctype before head"
regex.target: description: "意外的 doctype。预期 doctype 在 head 之前"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected start tag `<head>`. Expected `<head>` directly after doctype"
regex.target: description: "意外的开始标签 `<head>`。预期 `<head>` 在 doctype 之后"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected `%c-1`. Expected an attribute value or no `%c-1` instead"
regex.target: description: "意外的 `%c-1`。预期属性值或没有 `%c-1`"

regex.source: description: "Expected a `<!doctype html>` before anything else"
regex.target: description: "预期 `<!doctype html>` 位于任何其他内容之前"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected doctype end at `%c`. Expected `html` instead"
regex.target: description: "在 `%c` 处意外的 doctype 结束。预期 `html`"
description: "意外的 `%c`。预期 `public` 的标识符"
description: '意外的 `%c`。预期 `system` 的标识符（建议：`"about:legacy-compat"`）'
description: "意外的 `%c`。预期 ASCII 空白"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected `<noscript>`. Expected a closing tag or a meta element"
regex.target: description: "意外的 `<noscript>`。预期关闭标签或 meta 元素"
description: '预期 `<!doctype html>` 或 `<!doctype html system "about:legacy-compat">`'

regex.source: description: "Unexpected code point. Do not use noncharacters in HTML"
regex.target: description: "意外的码点。HTML 中不要使用非法字符"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected code point `%x`. Do not use noncharacters in HTML"
regex.target: description: "意外的码点 `%x`。HTML 中不要使用非法字符"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected code point. Do not use NULL characters in HTML"
regex.target: description: "意外的码点。HTML 中不要使用 NULL 字符"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected end of file. Expected closing tag instead"
regex.target: description: "意外文件末尾。预期关闭标签"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected code point. Do not use lone surrogate characters in HTML"
regex.target: description: "意外的码点。HTML 中不要使用孤立的代理字符"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected code point `%x`. Do not use lone surrogate characters in HTML"
regex.target: description: "意外的码点 `%x`。HTML 中不要使用孤立的代理字符"
description: "在 `%c` 处意外的字符。预期 `>`"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected `%c`. Expected whitespace, `/`, `>`, `=`, or probably an ASCII letter"
regex.target: description: "意外的 `%c`。预期空格、`/`、`>`、`=` 或 ASCII 字母"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected `%c`. Quote the attribute value to include it"
regex.target: description: "意外的 `%c`。引用属性值以包含它"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected `%c`. Add an attribute name before it"
regex.target: description: "意外的 `%c`。在其前添加属性名"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected code point `%x`. Do not use NULL characters in HTML"
regex.target: description: "意外的码点 `%x`。HTML 中不要使用 NULL 字符"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected `%c-1`. Expected it followed by `>` or in a quoted attribute value"
regex.target: description: "意外的 `%c-1`。预期其后跟 `>` 或在引用的属性值中"

regex.source: description: "Unexpected character reference. Expected known named character references"
regex.target: description: "意外的字符引用。预期已知的命名字符引用"

regex.source: .setName("Enable automatically updating links on file rename")
regex.target: .setName("启用文件重命名时自动更新链接")

regex.source: .setName("Enable bracket highlight for non matching brackets")

regex.target: .setName("显示 '删除代码' 按钮（仅在编辑视图中）")
.setName("显示 '选择代码' 按钮（仅在编辑视图中）")
.setName("显示 '折叠代码' 按钮（仅在阅读视图中）")
.setName("始终显示按钮（仅在编辑视图中）")

regex.source: .setName("Always show 'Copy Code' button for collapsed code blocks")
regex.target: .setName("始终显示折叠代码块的 '复制代码' 按钮")

regex.source: .setName("Disable folding for code blocks without fold or unfold specified")
regex.target: .setName("禁用未指定折叠或展开的代码块的折叠")
.setName("显示代码块语言（如果已定义语言）")
.setName("显示代码块语言图标（如果有）")
.setName("始终显示代码块语言图标（如果有）")

regex.source: .setDesc("Create your theme with the current colors and settings")
regex.target: .setDesc("使用当前颜色和设置创建您的主题")

regex.source: .setDesc("Select which settings group you want to modify.")
.setDesc("By default the plugin is disabled in source mode. You can enable it in source mode as well using this toggle.")
regex.target: .setDesc("默认情况下，插件在源模式下禁用。您也可以通过此切换在源模式下启用它。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, you can set the color for the active line (including codeblocks).")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，您可以为活动行设置颜色（包括代码块）。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Define languages, separated by a comma, to which the plugin should not apply. You can use a wildcard (*) either at the beginning, or at the end. For example: ad-* will exclude codeblocks where the language starts with ad- e.g.: ad-info, ad-error etc.")
regex.target: .setDesc("定义插件不应用于的语言，用逗号分隔。您可以在开头或结尾使用通配符（*）。例如：ad-* 将排除以 ad- 开头的语言，如 ad-info、ad-error 等。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Restore all settings of all the default themes to their original state.")
regex.target: .setDesc("恢复所有默认主题的所有设置到初始状态。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, you can set the color for the active line inside codeblocks only.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，您可以仅为代码块内的活动行设置颜色。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, indentation lines will be shown in reading view.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，缩进线将在阅读视图中显示。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, you can use links in the header, and code blocks as well. In code blocks, you must comment them to work! Examples: [[Document1]], [[Document1|DisplayText]], [[Document1#Paragraph|DisplayText]], [[Document1#^<BlockId>|DisplayText]], [DisplayText](Link), http://example.com etc.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，您可以在标题和代码块中使用链接。在代码块中，您必须注释它们才能生效！示例：[[Document1]]、[[Document1|DisplayText]]、[[Document1#Paragraph|DisplayText]]、[[Document1#^<BlockId>|DisplayText]]、[DisplayText](Link)、http://example.com 等。")

regex.source: .setDesc("To enable this setting, enable links usage option first! If enabled, code block links will be automatically updated, when a file is renamed. Please read the README for more information!")
regex.target: .setDesc("要启用此设置，请首先启用链接使用选项！如果启用，当文件重命名时，代码块链接将自动更新。请阅读 README 以获取更多信息！")

regex.source: .setDesc("If you click next to a bracket, and if the corresponding opening/closing bracket has been found both of them will be highlighted.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果您点击括号附近，且对应的开/闭括号已找到，它们都会被高亮。")

regex.source: .setDesc(`If you click next to a bracket, and it doesn't have a corresponding pair, or the pair does not match the opening/closing bracket (e.g: print("hello"] ), they will be highlighted.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`如果您点击括号附近，且它没有对应的成对括号，或成对括号与开/闭括号不匹配（例如：print("hello"]），它们将被高亮。`)

regex.source: .setDesc('If enabled, all code blocks are folded by default when opening a document. To disable this behavior for a specific code block, use the "unfold" parameter.')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果启用，打开文档时所有代码块默认折叠。要为特定代码块禁用此行为，请使用 "unfold" 参数。')

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, all occurrences of the selected text will be highlighted for easy identification.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，选定文本的所有出现将被高亮以方便识别。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, the code will be unwrapped in reading view.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，代码将在阅读视图中展开。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, an additional button will be displayed on every codeblock. If clicked, the content of that codeblock is deleted. Be careful!")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，每个代码块上将显示一个额外的按钮。点击后，该代码块的内容将被删除。请小心！")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, an additional button will be displayed on every codeblock. If clicked, the content of that codeblock is selected (including the first and last lines of the code blocks which begin with three backticks).")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，每个代码块上将显示一个额外的按钮。点击后，该代码块的内容将被选中（包括以三个反引号开头的代码块的首尾行）。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, an additional button will be displayed on every codeblock. If clicked, the content of that codeblock is wrapped/unwrapped.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，每个代码块上将显示一个额外的按钮。点击后，该代码块的内容将被折叠/展开。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, all enabled buttons will always be displayed, even when you click inside the code block. Otherwise, they will only be shown when the cursor is outside the code block.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，所有启用的按钮将始终显示，即使您点击代码块内。否则，它们仅在光标处于代码块外部时显示。")

regex.source: .setDesc('Override the default line separator (|) globally for text highlighting. You can also specify it for specific code blocks using the "lsep" parameter. The separator can only be one character long!')
regex.target: .setDesc('全局覆盖默认行分隔符（|）进行文本高亮。您还可以使用 "lsep" 参数为特定代码块指定分隔符。分隔符只能是一个字符！')

regex.source: .setDesc('Override the default text separator (:) globally for text highlighting. You can also specify it for specific code blocks using the "tsep" parameter. The separator can only be one character long!')
regex.target: .setDesc('全局覆盖默认文本分隔符（:）进行文本高亮。您还可以使用 "tsep" 参数为特定代码块指定分隔符。分隔符只能是一个字符！')

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled folding will use semi-fold method. This means, that the first X lines will be visible only. Select the number of visisble lines. You can also enable an additional uncollapse button. Please refer to the README for more information.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，折叠将使用半折叠方法。这意味着，只有前 X 行是可见的。选择可见行数。您还可以启用一个额外的展开按钮。请参考 README 以获取更多信息。")

regex.source: .setDesc('Add a language, to set the colors for this specific language. If you want to set colors for code blocks without a language, add "nolang" as a language.')
regex.target: .setDesc('添加语言，以设置特定语言的颜色。如果您想为没有指定语言的代码块设置颜色，请添加 "nolang" 作为语言。')

regex.source: .setDesc("Select on which side the border should be displayed.")
.setDesc("Define a name, by which you will reference the color. You can set the color itself after adding it to the list.")
regex.target: .setDesc("定义一个名称，您将用此名称引用颜色。您可以在将其添加到列表后设置颜色本身。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, the header text will be set to bold.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，标题文本将设置为粗体。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, the header text will be set to italic.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，标题文本将设置为斜体。")

regex.source: .setDesc('If enabled, code blocks without "fold" or "unfold" specified will not collapse when clicking the header.')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果启用，点击标题时，没有指定 "fold" 或 "unfold" 的代码块将不会折叠。')

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled a collapse icon will be displayed in the header. Select the position of the collapse icon.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，标题中将显示折叠图标。选择折叠图标的显示位置。")

regex.source: .setDesc('Overwrite the default "Collapsed Code" text in the header, when the file parameter is not defined.')
regex.target: .setDesc('当文件参数未定义时，覆盖标题中的默认 "折叠代码" 文本。')

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, the codeblock language will be displayed in the header. If disabled, all below settings are disabled as well!")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，代码块语言将显示在标题中。如果禁用，所有以下设置也将禁用！")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, the codeblock language text will be set to bold.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，代码块语言文本将设置为粗体。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, the codeblock language text will be set to italic.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，代码块语言文本将设置为斜体。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, the codeblock language will always be displayed (if a language is defined), even if the file parameter is not specified.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，即使文件参数未指定，代码块语言（如果有定义）也将始终显示。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, the codeblock language icon will be displayed in the header. If disabled, all below settings are disabled as well!")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，代码块语言图标将显示在标题中。如果禁用，所有以下设置也将禁用！")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, the codeblock language icon will always be displayed (if a language is defined and it has an icon), even if the file parameter is not specified.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，即使文件参数未指定，代码块语言图标（如果有定义且有图标）也将始终显示。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, highlighted lines will also highlight the gutter (line number), not just the line.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，高亮的行将高亮行号，而不仅仅是行。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, the active line number will be highlighted with a separate color.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，活动行号将用单独的颜色高亮。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, the background color, and the text color of inline code can be styled.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，可以设置内联代码的背景色和文本颜色。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, the styling is applied to documents when printed to PDF. By default PDF printing uses light theme colors.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，打印为 PDF 时将应用样式。默认情况下，PDF 打印使用浅色主题颜色。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, PDF printing will use the dark theme colors when a dark theme is selected, and light theme colors when a light theme is selected.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，PDF 打印将在选择深色主题时使用深色主题颜色，选择浅色主题时使用浅色主题颜色。")

regex.source: .setDesc('If enabled, all collapsed code blocks specified by the "fold" parameter will be expanded when printing. This results in the printed document containing expanded code blocks where "fold" was used.')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果启用，打印时将展开所有由 "fold" 参数指定的折叠代码块。这将导致打印的文档包含在使用 "fold" 时展开的代码块。')

regex.source: .setDesc(`Select which color you would like to set for ${this.plugin.settings.languageSpecificLanguageName} specifically.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`选择您要为 ${this.plugin.settings.languageSpecificLanguageName} 特别设置的颜色。`)

regex.source: .setTooltip("Restore default theme to its original state")
regex.target: .setTooltip("将默认主题恢复到初始状态")

regex.source: .setTooltip(`Add the selected property to customize it for code block language ${languageName} specifically`)
regex.target: .setTooltip(`添加选定的属性以专门针对代码块语言 ${languageName} 进行自定义`)

regex.source: .setTooltip(`Delete all language specific colors for code block language ${languageName}`)
regex.target: .setTooltip(`删除代码块语言 ${languageName} 的所有语言特定颜色`)

regex.source: .appendText("If you like this plugin, and would like to help support continued development, use the button below!")
regex.target: .appendText("如果您喜欢此插件，并希望支持持续开发，请使用下面的按钮！")

regex.source: createTextNode("For more information, please read the ")
'To set this color, enable the option "Enable editor active line highlighting" first.'
regex.target: '要设置此颜色，请先启用选项 "启用编辑器活动行高亮"。'

regex.source: 'To set this color, enable the option "Enable codeblock active line highlight" first.'
regex.target: '要设置此颜色，请先启用选项 "启用代码块活动行高亮"。'

regex.source: "Bracket highlight color for non matching brackets"
regex.target: "不匹配括号的括号高亮颜色"

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, in editing mode the 'Copy Code' button will always be visible on collapsed code blocks in the header. In reading mode the 'Copy Code' button will always be visible on collapsed and uncollapsed code blocks as well. Otherwise, it will only appear when hovering over the header (in editing mode) or the code block (in reading mode).")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，在编辑模式下，'复制代码' 按钮将始终显示在标题中的折叠代码块上。在阅读模式下，'复制代码' 按钮也将始终显示在折叠和未折叠的代码块上。否则，只有将鼠标悬停在标题（在编辑模式下）或代码块（在阅读模式下）上时才会显示。")
